note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Sacral region wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Sacral region measures 1.2 cm x 1.8 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 52% slough, 48% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Sacral region — not improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
